location.description: Vicuña is a project made up of the Josemaria deposit, an advanced copper project located in the province of San Juan, Argentina; and the Filo del Sol deposit, a copper, gold and silver resource located in the province of San Juan, Argentina, and in the adjacent III Region of Chile. Josemaria project is located the 471 km from the city of San Juan by the current route.

location.description: The Filo del Sol Project is located in the Atacama Region, in northern Chile and in the adjacent province of San Juan, Argentina, 140 kilometers southeast of the city of Copiapó, Chile, and extends to both sides of the border between Argentina and Chile. The average altitudes are from 4,000 to 4,900 m.a.s.l.
technical_economic.product: Copper, gold and silver cathodes, silver in doré and copper concentrates

location.description: The Altar Project is located in Argentina, within the Province of San Juan, about 10 km from the Argentina-Chile border, and approximately 180 km in direct line west of the city of San Juan. Elevations within the Project area range between 3,100 meters above sea level (masl) and 4,000 masl.
